name: agent-memory-cowork
description: Codex-facing host-project adapter for Owledge Kit's Markdown-first agent memory skills, commands, diagnostics, and reports. Claude hooks are packaged separately in the Claude manifest.

interface.shortDescription: Give agents durable Markdown project memory.
interface.longDescription: Keeps plans, evidence, reviews, handoffs, and session context durable as private Markdown-first project memory, then prepares reviewed summaries for RAG, LightRAG, and GraphRAG exports.
